tinyWinsV5.description: Tiny Wins V5 - Major enhancements based on user feedback

tasks.description: Expand task database - Each category should have ~50 tasks (currently 10), randomly selected
tasks.notes: Current: 7 categories × 10 tasks = 70 total. Target: 7 categories × 50 tasks = 350 total. Tasks should be diverse, ADHD-friendly micro-tasks.

tasks.description: Fix or remove the text entry box - Currently no connection between typed input and generated tasks
options: Option A: Remove the text entry box entirely
Option B: Implement smart task matching based on user input (e.g., type 'kitchen' → show kitchen-related tasks)
Option C: Use input as intent detection to filter/sort relevant categories
tasks.notes: User reported: typing 'clean the kitchen' returns 'load laundry' - no logical connection.

tasks.description: Enhance celebration system - More visual and rewarding completion experience
tasks.notes: Current: simple emoji animation. Need: richer visual feedback, satisfying completion moment.

tasks.description: Design long-term growth system - What keeps users coming back at 485+ day streaks?
tasks.notes: Consider: evolving visuals, unlockables, milestone rewards, progression systems that scale with user commitment. Seedling→sprout concept is good but needs to grow meaningfully over hundreds of days.

tasks.description: Implement visual growth progression - Plant/tree that evolves with streak/tasks
tasks.notes: Think about: what does day 1 look like vs day 100 vs day 485? How many tasks completed by then? Visual representation should reflect that journey.

seoulFamilyTrip.description: Family trip to Seoul/Asia - June 2026 vacation planning

constraints.preferences: Safe, family-friendly, multiple locations OK if flights are short
constraints.seoulStay: Can stay at husband's apartment for up to 1 week (saves money but not comfortable)

tasks.description: Research flight options from Nashville to Seoul for June 2026 (departing after June 6)
tasks.notes: 2 adults + 2 children. Look for cheapest fares, consider different airlines, layover options.

tasks.description: Research alternative meeting destinations in Asia - safe and family-friendly
tasks.notes: Consider: Japan (Tokyo, Osaka), Taiwan (Taipei), Thailand (Chiang Mai, Bangkok - check safety), Vietnam (Da Nang, Hanoi), Philippines (Cebu, Palawan), Malaysia (Kuala Lumpur, Penang), Singapore. Factor in flight times from both Nashville and Seoul.

tasks.description: Research multi-destination itineraries within Asia
tasks.notes: If meeting in Seoul, where else can they go with short flights? (Busan, Jeju, Japan, Taiwan). If meeting elsewhere, what combinations work?

tasks.description: Calculate total costs for each option including flights, accommodation, food, activities
tasks.notes: Factor in: staying at husband's apartment for part of Seoul trip (saves ~7 nights hotel), family of 4 costs, budget-friendly accommodation options.

tasks.description: Create 3-4 complete vacation options with detailed itineraries
tasks.notes: Each option should include: flight routes and costs, accommodation suggestions, day-by-day itinerary, estimated total budget, pros/cons.

audioEmpireNicheResearch.description: Audio Empire - Niche research, brand guidelines, and marketing strategy

userDecisions.automationLevel: Full AI autopilot - decisions based on AI capability, not personal preference
userDecisions.voiceStrategy: Professional voice (not Jayna's), unique sounding, high audio quality priority
userDecisions.reviewProcess: Jayna reviews 5-10 episodes before full automation
userDecisions.hosting: n8n Cloud hosted initially, self-hosted possible if scaled

tasks.description: Develop complete marketing plan - launch strategy, growth tactics, distribution channels

disneyOrlandoTrip.description: Disney World Orlando Magic Kingdom trip - March 13, 2026

constraints.goal: Magical Disney experience, not just a theme park day

tasks.description: Research military discounts for Disney World 1-day tickets
tasks.notes: Check Shades of Green, military ticket offices, Disney's official military offers, any special promotions for March 2026

tasks.description: Find budget-friendly hotel options near Magic Kingdom for March 12-13
tasks.notes: Consider: Disney value resorts vs off-site hotels, military discounts on hotels, shuttle availability, proximity to park

tasks.description: Research Magic Kingdom crowd levels for Friday March 13, 2026
tasks.notes: Check crowd calendars, historical data, what to expect for mid-March Friday, strategies for busy days

tasks.description: Identify must-do Disney experiences for 8-year-old (magical encounters, characters, immersive experiences)
tasks.notes: Focus on: character meet & greets, immersive attractions (not just rides), parades, fireworks, any bookable experiences

tasks.description: Identify must-do Disney experiences for 12-year-old (the 'Disney magic', not just thrill rides)
tasks.notes: Focus on: immersive theming, unique Disney-only experiences, nostalgia factor, photo opportunities, special moments

tasks.description: Plan optimal Magic Kingdom itinerary for maximum experiences in one day
tasks.notes: Include: rope drop strategy, Genie+/lightning lane recommendations, best order to hit attractions, dining suggestions, break times

tasks.description: Identify best roller coasters at Magic Kingdom and strategy to ride 2-3 with minimal wait
tasks.notes: Seven Dwarfs Mine Train, Space Mountain, Big Thunder Mountain, TRON (if open). Best times to ride, lightning lane options.

tasks.description: Research what needs to be booked in advance for March 13
tasks.notes: Dining reservations, Genie+, Lightning Lane selections, any special experiences, mobile order setup

tasks.description: Compile best tips and tricks for Magic Kingdom on a budget with kids
tasks.notes: Money-saving hacks, free experiences, what to bring, what to skip, insider secrets, avoiding regrets

tasks.description: Create complete trip plan with day-by-day itinerary, costs, and booking checklist
